---
title: "Partners"
toc: false
---

::: {.partners-grid}

::: {.partner-item}
[![](assets/logos/kadaster.png)](https://www.kadaster.nl){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.partner-item}
[![](assets/logos/utwente.png)](https://www.utwente.nl){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.partner-item}
[![](assets/logos/cvd.svg)](https://www.cvdnederland.nl){target="_blank"}
:::

:::
